benefits.description: Strong erection onset 5-6 hours post-dose. Enables multiple rounds (6-7) over 5+ hours. Ready again next morning around 8am.
Ability to achieve multiple rounds with recovery time of minutes between

side_effects.description: Nausea for approximately 45 minutes to 1 hour after PT-141 administration

protocol_notes: Male (age 45), husband of commenter. Uses PT-141 1.5-2mg doses twice daily (4pm and 9-10pm). Takes Pepto-Bismol before dosing and ginger chews to manage nausea. Uses with 'blue pill' (sildenafil). Has been using for 8 years. Combined with high sexual frequency (6-7 days/week, 10-14 ejaculations/week) and optimized testosterone. History of premature ejaculation in mid-30s that resolved with PT-141 and increased sexual frequency.
